query:
Here's a recommendation I got from our data modeler... agrees mostly with yours.  OK.. Write this up as a 'proposed scope' for a new feature.  The scope as I understand it is to add the goal sentence to the context_cycle(start) as optional, ensure its available and persist in cycle_events.  you can augment based on the topics we just talked about as needed.  Will also want to review context_briefing more formally as well as the injection path to be able to utiize the new signal.  :Datamodeler: Summary recommendation:                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                  
  ▎ Store goal on the cycle_events Start event row. Cache in SessionState.current_goal for hot-path use. Load from cycle_events on session registration/resume.                        
  
  Do not store on sessions — wrong abstraction level, wrong write path, wrong reliability tier for a value that needs to survive across session boundaries and be available to         
  retrospective review.                                           
                                                                                                                                                                                       
  One forward-looking note: if the goal sentence is eventually embedded (vectorized) for semantic search ranking — using it as a context vector in FusedScoreInputs — the embedding    
  would live in the session state as a vector, generated at cycle Start from the stored text. The storage decision doesn't need to account for that now, but the design is compatible
  with it.

entries.title: ADR-001 col-025: Goal Stored on cycle_events Start Row, Not sessions Table
ADR-002 col-025: synthesize_from_session Returns current_goal Directly
ADR-004 crt-025: Phase Narrative as Optional Field on RetrospectiveReport
ADR-002 col-031: Time-Based Retention Window for Frequency Table Rebuild
topic_signal write-time enrichment: session registry in-memory feature as fallback
